name: CRT
description: The scene behind the window blurred and displayed as an old tube monitor, with barrel curvature, scanlines, a phosphor mask, a slow rolling band and a corner vignette. An optional phosphor tint pushes it toward the classic green or amber terminal look. It shows through wherever the window itself is translucent, so pair it with an opacity rule.
author: PlasmaZones

parameters.name: Blur radius
parameters.description: How strongly the scene behind the window is blurred (px)

parameters.name: Corner radius
parameters.description: Corner rounding of the pane (px, match the Border pack)

parameters.name: Curvature
parameters.description: How strongly the picture bulges like a tube

parameters.name: Phosphor mask
parameters.description: Strength of the vertical RGB phosphor stripes

parameters.name: Roll speed
parameters.description: How fast the bright band rolls up the picture, where 0 disables it

parameters.name: Phosphor tint
parameters.description: How strongly the picture shifts toward the tint colour, where 1.0 is a monochrome terminal

parameters.name: Tint colour
parameters.description: Phosphor colour, terminal green by default
